name: @adidoes/pi-meep
description: Play a short notification sound when pi finishes responding.
readme: # @adidoes/pi-meep ## pi finished ## computer says meep that is it that is the product zero dashboards zero synergy one noise immense shareholder value ## acquire creature ```bash pi install npm:@adidoes/pi-meep ``` reload the beast: ```text /reload ``` local goblin mode: ```bash pi install /absolute/path/to/pi-meep ``` ## does it boot ```bash npm run check ``` ## License MIT meep responsibly
